variants.title: Filtrec DVD20008A05B Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20008M5A000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec DVD20008A05B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the DVD20008A05B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
